{{Sequel Disambiguation}}{{Card Infobox|Shiv||2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Exhaust|2}}{{C|Shiv||2}} is a 0 {{Icon|SE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Token|Token|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} Card available to the {{KW|Silent||2}}. It deals 4 damage then {{KW|Exhaust|Exhausts|2}} itself. The {{KW|Silent||2}} has a lot of dedicated support for {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}}.
== Sources ==
{{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} cannot be added to a player's Deck by any means. The following sources will generate a {{C|Shiv||2}} in the player's hand when played or activated:
===Cards===
* {{C|Blade Dance||2}}: 3(4) {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}}.
* {{C|Cloak and Dagger||2}}: 1(2) {{C|Shiv|Shiv(s)|2}}.
* {{C|Leading Strike||2}}: 1 {{C|Shiv||2}}.
* {{C|Hidden Daggers||2}}: 2 {{C|Shiv|Shivs(+)|2}}.
* {{C|Infinite Blades||2}}: 1 {{C|Shiv||2}} at the start of turn.
* {{C|Up My Sleeve||2}}: 3(4) {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}}.
* {{C|Blade of Ink||2}}: 2(3) {{KW|Inky||2}} {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}}.
* {{C|Fan of Knives||2}}: 4(5) {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}}.
* {{C|Storm of Steel||2}}: Discard your Hand. 1 {{C|Shiv||2}} into your Hand for each card discarded.

===Relics===
* {{R|Ninja Scroll||2}}: 3 {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} at the start of combat.
===Potions===
* {{P|Cunning Potion||2}}: 3 {{C|Shiv|Shivs+|2}}.

== Interactions ==
* {{C|Accuracy||2}}: {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} deal 4 additional damage.
* {{C|Phantom Blades||2}}: {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} gain {{KW|Retain||2}}. The first {{C|Shiv||2}} you play each turn deals 9 additional damage.
* {{C|Knife Trap||2}}: Play every {{C|Shiv||2}} in your Exhaust Pile on the enemy.
* {{C|Fan of Knives||2}}: {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} now hit ALL enemies.
* {{R|Helical Dart||2}}: Whenever you play a {{C|Shiv||2}}, gain 1 {{BD|Dexterity||2}} this turn.

=== Synergies === 
* As {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} are 0-{{Icon|SE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack|Attack|2}} cards that are usually generated in multiples, they synergize with:
** {{C|Finisher||2}}, which increases in power for the number of Attacks played.
** {{C|Envenom||2}}, which applies {{BD|Poison||2}} with each {{C|Shiv||2}}.
** Buffs/Debuffs activated when a card is played, including {{BD|Strangle||2}}, {{BD|Afterimage||2}}, {{BD|Serpent Form||2}}, and another player's {{BD|Sneaky||2}}.
** {{2|Relics}} that trigger when Attacks are played, including {{R|Shuriken||2}}, {{R|Kunai||2}}, {{R|Ornamental Fan||2}}, {{R|Kusarigama||2}}, and {{R|Nunchaku||2}}.
* Anything that benefits from {{KW|Exhaust}} will be triggered by playing {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}}.

=== Neutral ===
* If a {{C|Shiv||2}} generated by this card exceeds your hand size limit, it gets added to the discard pile.
* Because of their low base damage, any {{BD|Strength||2}} gain will significantly increase their damage output.
** Any negative {{BD|Strength||2}} and {{BD|Weak||2}} will also greatly mitigate damage from {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}}.

=== Anti-Synergy ===
* As multiple {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} are often played in a single turn, they have an anti-synergy with:
** Effects that limit card plays, including {{R|Velvet Choker||2}} and {{BD|Ringing||2}}.
** Effects that produce negative effects for played cards, including {{BD|Thorns||2}} and {{BD|Tender||2}}.
** {{BD|Tangled||2}}, which increases {{Icon|SE|2}}-cost of {{C|Shiv|Shivs|2}} to 1.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Shiv to the game.
